== Notes for [[Item:Q80715|Q80715]] ==

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=updike&id=I55891

•ID: I55891

•Name: Pedania Pedanius FUSCUS

•Sex: F

•Birth: ABT 157

Father: Gnaeus Pedanius FUSCUS b: ABT 130

Mother: Ummidia Commificia ANTONIA b: ABT 133

Marriage 1 Caius Julius MARIUS b: ABT 155

Children

1. Mariana MINOR b: ABT 180

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
